title: Luffy on Amazon Lily
description: In the Amazon Lily storyline, this section centers on Unknown person #6, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #9, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #2 as the scene develops across pages 1–4.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Turn these guys back to normal!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You can do something like that, right!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I certainly can undo the petification.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Or I let you leave the island!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Choose one and abandon the other!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Show your true nature, you man ..!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: is willing to lower his head...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: So this is where you were!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I have no idea what happened...
